title: PR-1 product read-model default GameSession route
summary: Route the default Web shell to read the PR-1 GameSession Worker projection as gameplay truth and quarantine static product-gate fixtures to diagnostics/tests without UI authority over simulation.
acceptance: Default Web gameplay initializes or connects to the PR-1 GameSession Worker route and treats its projection as gameplay truth for residents, resources, alerts, job markers and selected-object details

WEB_PRODUCT_GATE_READ_MODEL and reviewed-playable-session static/playback surfaces remain only in tests, diagnostics or explicitly labeled historical gates; default gameplay does not read them as town state
React and Pixi adapters render read-only session projections and may keep only camera, hover, selected id, build-mode affordance, locale, UI scale and diagnostics visibility locally
No Web, React, Pixi or Electron code creates jobs, reservations, resource counts, resident positions, build progress, blocked reasons or command outcomes

The product read model carries a single GameSession basis: tick, snapshot sequence, scenario/content id, world hash and read-model hash, and all visible PR-1 residents/resources/alerts/details come from that basis
Presentation interpolation uses RenderSnapshot basis only and cannot mutate authoritative cell, path progress, job step, resource quantity or build state
The default route no longer uses WM-0160 drain helpers or explicit advance command batches as normal game time; time progression comes from the completed WM-0164 Worker scheduler

The client requests GameSession projection v1, enters running only after the exact schema-v3 Ready contract, validates negotiated RenderSnapshot/UiDelta payloads through the sim-protocol public root and fails closed without fixture fallback on mismatch or malformed newer data
E2E or focused Web tests prove the default route can observe advancing GameSession projection state without synthetic canvas dispatch as gameplay evidence

The already-authoritative GameSession render kind resource maps losslessly to the additive public presentation WorldEntityKind resource; HUD localization renders resource/资源 and neither Web nor UI aliases it to structure, resident or visitor

At the default 1424x861 product viewport, real Playwright mouse input can select both a resident and a resource marker and the resource inspector shows only same-basis authoritative quantities; no DOM/CSS replacement or synthetic dispatch is accepted

An explicit selected entity id that is absent from a newer coherent projection clears selection instead of selecting another entity, and rapid resident/resource selection never displays detail for the wrong identity

A TypeScript-aware default-gameplay source graph guard rejects fixture/reviewed-playback aliases, sim-core or package-internal imports, and direct playable advance/drain/command-clock APIs while preserving explicitly classified diagnostics-only branches
No broad product UX redesign, new final art, localization rewrite, public save UI, Electron preload expansion, public release action or telemetry/account surface is added
The report identifies every fixture/debug path left behind and how reviewers can confirm it is not the default gameplay source
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run apps/web/src/simulation-worker-session.test.ts apps/web/src/product-gate-harness.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/localization.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts packages/sim-protocol/src/game-session-projection.test.ts packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts

history.details: Scoped as the Web default-route/read-model task after WM-0163; remains proposed and must not implement broader PR-2/PR-4 UX.
Changed dependency from WM-0163 to WM-0164 so schema-v3 projection types, validation and continuous Worker scheduling exist before Web consumption; task remains proposed and unclaimed.

Routed the default Web shell to coherent schema-v3 PR-1 GameSession Worker projections, removed fixture and UI-driven clock authority, added fail-closed and real-input scheduler evidence; all required checks pass.

changes_requested: High: at the required 1424x861 default viewport all four resource projection points are covered by player-top-bar; real page.mouse clicks on 8:1, 10:1, 12:1 and 14:1 leave resident 0:1 selected, while web-shell.e2e.test.ts:597 tests only resident selection. Make authoritative resource quantities reachable/visible and add real resident+resource mouse evidence. Medium: playable-worker-projection.ts:400-413 replaces an unavailable selected id with the first resident instead of clearing it; add rapid/unavailable identity coverage. Medium: product-gate-harness.test.ts:51-68 is a bypassable exact-string scan limited to shell-bootstrap; smoke-read-model aliases or direct session APIs can restore fixture/time authority without failing it. Strengthen the default-route source guard.

Public Web read-model decision required: GameSession projects kind=resource, but public WorldEntityKind has no resource member and ui-react renders the closed kind directly; WM-0165 cannot edit sim-protocol/ui-react. Recommended: approve public resource WorldEntityKind plus localized HUD handling/tests and add those exact files to allowedPaths. Alternatives: reviewed semantic-kind label contract, or relax the no-facility acceptance (not recommended). Web-only resident/visitor aliasing or DOM/CSS replacement would be false authority/presentation.

Approved ADR-0017 presentation consumer completion: exact WorldEntityKind resource, Pixi marker/selection, and localized HUD files authorized; wire schema/projection remains unchanged. Canvas retains claim and may continue the three review repairs under expanded exact checks.

Closed all WM-0165 changes-requested findings: lossless localized resource presentation with real 1424x861 resident-to-resource mouse evidence and exact quantities; explicit unavailable selection clearing and rapid identity tests; AST default graph plus runtime module/outbound guards; required focused, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, diff and quality gates pass.

changes_requested: High: default runtime module isolation is still violated. apps/web/src/shell-bootstrap.ts:33-42 statically imports diagnostic-package-gate; diagnostic-package-gate.ts:12-16 statically imports product-gate-harness; product-gate-harness.ts:3-4 imports harness data and product-gate-fixture. A real default-route Vite plus Chromium transform probe loaded diagnostic-package-gate.ts, product-gate-harness.ts, product-gate-harness.data.json, and product-gate-fixture.ts. The guards at product-gate-harness.test.ts:58-63 and web-shell.e2e.test.ts:676-683 use not.toEqual(arrayContaining(the entire forbidden list)), so they pass unless every forbidden module is loaded. Make the diagnostic package branch truly diagnostics-only or otherwise remove all harness/fixture transitive edges from the default loaded graph, and assert each forbidden module individually while retaining wmDiagnostics=1. Resource semantics, exact 1424x861 mouse 1:1 to 8:1 with 80/0/80, unavailable/rapid identity, fatal clearing, focused tests, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke 18/18, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, task validation, diff check, and quality all passed.

Closed the final source-isolation High: default diagnostics dependencies are dynamically gated behind wmDiagnostics=1, TypeScript-aware import graph and per-module runtime guards no longer false-green, while real resource/selection, focused, Web E2E, Worker smoke and full quality gates pass.

verified: No blocking findings: independent default Vite/Chromium graph excludes every forbidden module individually; wmDiagnostics=1 remains functional; real 1424x861 mouse selects resident 1:1 then resource 8:1 with exact 80/0/80; focused 53/53, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke 18/18, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, task validation, diff check, and quality 458/458 pass. Residual risks remain documented: no public Worker transport-crash hook, unsupported GameSession save/load, and oversized shell-bootstrap.

saveLoadStance: No public save UI or compatibility promise is introduced. Web may expose only fail-closed or diagnostic GameSession save status until a later reviewed save task.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-core/** and packages/sim-worker/** implementation changes; packages/sim-protocol/** changes except the exact additive presentation-only packages/sim-protocol/src/web-read-model.ts WorldEntityKind resource member
Any Simulation Worker envelope, schema, GameSession projection, validator, message family, command contract, save contract or public package export change
React/Pixi/Electron code owning authoritative world, job, reservation, resident position, resource, build progress, action availability or blocked-reason state
Resource-to-structure/resident/visitor aliases, DOM/CSS inspector replacement, invented resource trends or quantities, or presentation state treated as simulation authority
large product UX redesign, PR-2 autonomous-life behavior, PR-3 general command/building expansion, PR-4 map-first UX redesign or final art/audio production
synthetic canvas dispatch or debug payloads as standalone gameplay evidence
public save compatibility, migration, release, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public feedback surfaces
presentationContractStance: ADR-0017 consumer completion only: add resource to the existing public WorldEntityKind presentation enum and its exhaustive renderer/HUD localization consumers. This is additive and lossless, changes no wire schema or GameSession projection contract, and introduces no dependency.

review.summary: No blocking findings: independent default Vite/Chromium graph excludes every forbidden module individually; wmDiagnostics=1 remains functional; real 1424x861 mouse selects resident 1:1 then resource 8:1 with exact 80/0/80; focused 53/53, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke 18/18, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, task validation, diff check, and quality 458/458 pass. Residual risks remain documented: no public Worker transport-crash hook, unsupported GameSession save/load, and oversized shell-bootstrap.
